title: Cyrtandra cordifolia
taxonomy: Cyrtandra cordifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyrtandra, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the African violet family. This family includes over 1,000 species of plants, many of which are popular as ornamental plants due to their attractive flowers and foliage. Cyrtandra cordifolia is a specific species within this larger family.

It is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits.
